assertions.title: Missing discovery endpoint opens setup instead of posting

steps.expected: Dashboard loads with onboarding wizard visible
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded successfully with onboarding wizard visible (Continue button present, Run discovery button accessible)

steps.expected: localStorage should be empty or have no discovery endpoint saved
steps.observed: localStorage was empty (no keys present) - correct state for testing missing discovery endpoint

steps.action: Perform NORMAL POINTER CLICK on 'Run discovery' button using agent-browser click @e6
steps.expected: Click should succeed (not blocked by overlay) and open discovery setup wizard
steps.observed: Click succeeded without errors. Discovery setup wizard opened with 'Close wizard', 'Status. Current step.', 'Path. Available.', and step buttons (Config, Server, Tunnel, Relay, Test, Done) visible

steps.action: Check network requests for discovery POST
steps.expected: NO discovery POST request should be sent
steps.observed: Network request log showed 'No requests captured' - no discovery POST was sent

steps.expected: No console errors should be present
steps.observed: Console errors check completed successfully with no output - no errors present

evidence.network: No requests captured - no discovery POST sent

summary: Tested VAL-DISCOVERY-001: PASSED. Round 5 testing confirmed that the pointer-events fix from commit fcf8705 is working correctly. A NORMAL pointer click on the 'Run discovery' button succeeded (not blocked by the onboarding overlay), the discovery setup wizard opened as expected, and NO discovery POST request was sent - exactly matching the assertion specification.
